scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:crypto && npm run test:integration
scripts._comment_test_node: Zero-dep node tests (source-regex + behavioral). Fast, no npm install needed.
scripts.test:node: node behavior.test.js && node architecture.test.js && node e2e.test.js
scripts._comment_test_integration: Full E2E suite. Requires backend/npm install AND tests/npm install. Boots a real server against a tempdir.
